title: Policies granting all privileges are security sensitive
description: Avoid granting all privileges to a user or group as it poses a security risk.
message: Policies granting all privileges are security sensitive
recommendation: Limit privileges to the minimum necessary

noncompliant.description: Grants all privileges to a user

compliant.description: Grants specific privileges to a user

why_is_this_an_issue: Grants all privileges to a user can lead to unauthorized access and data breaches
how_to_fix: Limit privileges to the minimum necessary

metadata.title: Policies granting all privileges are security sensitive
